title: A1 — Extend fab_extract_knowledge schema + service with relevance_scope/relevance_paths + personal-narrow silent degrade
description: Add relevance_scope?: enum(narrow|broad) + relevance_paths?: string[] to _FabExtractKnowledgeInputBaseSchema. In extract-knowledge service: normalize layer=personal+narrow → silent degrade to broad+[] (emit knowledge_scope_degraded with stable_id=`pending:<idempotency_key>` sentinel), then renderFreshEntry writes the two YAML lines (only when caller-provided, undefined = no line). Idempotency hash MUST NOT include the new fields (preserves rc.5→rc.7 collision detection).

files.change: Add relevance_scope: z.enum(['narrow','broad']).optional() and relevance_paths: z.array(z.string()).optional() — mirror the L518-533 modify schema shape; do NOT add .strict()

Add normalize helper near L110: if layer==='personal' && relevance_scope==='narrow' → flip to broad+[], call emitEventBestEffort with knowledge_scope_degraded { stable_id: `pending:${idempotency_key}`, from_scope: 'narrow', to_scope: 'broad', reason: 'personal-implies-broad' } BEFORE knowledge_proposed emit. Extend renderFreshEntry frontmatter (L223-234) — emit `relevance_scope: broad` (bare) and `relevance_paths: ["a","b"]` (flow form, scan.ts:1042-1060 pattern) ONLY when args supplied. Hash inputs at L78 unchanged.

Extend buildInput with optional relevance_scope/paths params. Add tests: (a) explicit narrow+paths writes frontmatter, (b) personal+narrow silently degrades + emits knowledge_scope_degraded, (c) idempotency_key unchanged when scope/paths vary (rc.5→rc.7 canary)
Re-baseline via pnpm test -u after schema extension — should show only relevance_scope/paths additions
Add positive/negative parse cases for relevance_scope enum + relevance_paths array

implementation: Mirror the relevance_scope+relevance_paths zod fields from _fabReviewModifyChangesSchema (L518-533) into _FabExtractKnowledgeInputBaseSchema (L397-453); both optional, no .strict()

In extract-knowledge.ts add a layer-degrade helper invoked at L110 BEFORE renderFreshEntry call at L161: if layer==='personal' && relevance_scope==='narrow' flip to broad+[] and emit knowledge_scope_degraded via emitEventBestEffort using `pending:${idempotency_key}` for stable_id

Extend renderFreshEntry FreshEntryArgs (L206-215) with relevanceScope?:'narrow'|'broad' + relevancePaths?:string[]; in YAML assembly (L223-234) emit `relevance_scope: ${value}` (bare) and `relevance_paths: [${quoteIfNeeded list}]` only when present
VERIFY hash inputs at L78 unchanged (sha256 of {source_session,type,slug}) — add an assertion test that key is identical across scope-only diffs
Update buildInput helper in extract-knowledge.test.ts to accept optional fields; add 3 new test cases (explicit narrow+paths persistence, personal+narrow degrade event, idempotency stability)
Run pnpm test, re-baseline tool-contracts snapshot, verify api-contracts.test.ts passes

reference.pattern: Dual-export base+refined zod schema; emitEventBestEffort try/catch; YAML flow-style array emit
reference.examples: Mirror _fabReviewModifyChangesSchema field shape verbatim; emit knowledge_scope_degraded with the exact reason='personal-implies-broad' string used by review.ts:725-739; YAML emit follows scan.ts:1042-1060 quoteIfNeeded pattern

criteria: _FabExtractKnowledgeInputBaseSchema accepts relevance_scope+relevance_paths (both optional); zod parse succeeds for {narrow,["src/**"]} and {broad,[]}
extract-knowledge.ts L78 idempotency hash output identical before/after schema change for fixed {source_session,type,slug} input (test assertion)
Pending file frontmatter contains `relevance_scope: narrow` + `relevance_paths: ["src/**"]` when caller supplies them; NO lines when caller omits (regex assertions toMatch + not.toMatch)
Personal+narrow input triggers exactly one knowledge_scope_degraded event with stable_id=`pending:<idempotency_key>` + reason='personal-implies-broad'
pnpm test passes after snapshot re-baseline; tool-contracts.test.ts.snap diff shows ONLY relevance_scope/paths additions
extract-knowledge.test.ts has 3+ new test cases covering happy path, degrade path, idempotency canary

rationale.chosen_approach: Schema-first extension with service-side silent degrade; preserves rc.5→rc.7 idempotency by keeping new fields out of sha256 hash
alternatives_considered: Strict() on base schema to reject unknown keys
Add fields to idempotency hash for stricter collision detection
Hard-error on personal+narrow instead of silent degrade
decision_factors: Cross-service event shape uniformity with review.ts:725-739
Forward-compat with future MCP client versions (no .strict())
rationale.tradeoffs: Silent degrade is observability-only (event emitted); a buggy caller cannot detect the flip from MCP response — accepted because review.ts behaves identically

manual_checks: Run `fab serve` then invoke fab_extract_knowledge with relevance_scope='narrow', relevance_paths=['src/auth/**'] — verify pending file frontmatter contains both lines verbatim
Invoke with layer='personal', relevance_scope='narrow' — verify events.jsonl gains knowledge_scope_degraded entry with reason='personal-implies-broad' and stable_id starting with 'pending:'
success_metrics: Zero changes to sha256 hash inputs at L78
Snapshot diff confined to two new fields
